summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Initiative-level Milestones, Activities, and Documents features. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified - milestones CRUD, activities CRUD with colored type badges, document upload/delete with drag-drop zone.
passed_tests: Backend: Get initiative with milestones array - SUCCESS
Backend: Add milestone to initiative - SUCCESS
Backend: Edit milestone - SUCCESS
Backend: Delete milestone - SUCCESS
Backend: All milestone statuses (Pending, In Progress, Completed, Delayed) - SUCCESS
Backend: Get initiative with activities array - SUCCESS
Backend: Add Meeting activity - SUCCESS
Backend: Add Workshop activity - SUCCESS
Backend: Add Review activity - SUCCESS
Backend: Add Training activity - SUCCESS
Backend: Edit activity - SUCCESS
Backend: Delete activity - SUCCESS
Backend: All activity statuses (Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) - SUCCESS
Backend: All activity types (Meeting, Workshop, Review, Training, Presentation, Planning Session, Demo, Other) - SUCCESS
Backend: Get initiative with documents array - SUCCESS
Backend: Upload document - SUCCESS
Backend: Upload PDF document - SUCCESS
Backend: Delete document - SUCCESS
Backend: Document download URL works - SUCCESS
Frontend: Milestones section visible with Add Milestone button - SUCCESS
Frontend: Activities section visible with Add Activity button - SUCCESS
Frontend: Documents section with drag-and-drop zone visible - SUCCESS
Frontend: Activity type badges with different colors (Meeting-indigo, Workshop-purple, Review-amber) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Milestone status badges with colors (Completed-green, In Progress-blue, Pending-gray) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Milestone modal with name, description, due_date, owner, status fields - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Activity modal with type, date, time, location, attendees, status, notes fields - SUCCESS
Frontend: Document upload via Browse Files - SUCCESS
Frontend: Edit/Delete buttons present for milestones and activities - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Initiative milestones, activities, and documents CRUD operations work correctly via API
Activity type badges correctly display with different colors based on type
Document upload works with proper file metadata (name, type, size, upload date)
Drag-and-drop zone visible for document uploads
All modal forms have proper fields for creating/editing items
Status badges use appropriate color coding for visual clarity
seed_data_creation: Seed data exists with ETO initiative containing 3 milestones and 4 activities with different types (Meeting, Workshop, Review)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Initiative-level milestones, activities, and documents features are fully functional. Activity types display with colored badges (Meeting-indigo, Workshop-purple, Review-amber, Training-teal, etc.). Documents support upload via drag-drop or file picker with download capability.
